tests.name: Verify Splash screen displays correctly on cold launch
tests.expected: Splash Screen is visible with Logo & Brand name

tests.name: Verify automatic redirect to Onboarding after splash timeout
tests.expected: App redirects to Onboarding Screen 1 automatically

tests.name: Verify Onboarding Page 1 content and elements
tests.expected: Title, description, and dots indicators display correctly

tests.name: Verify Onboarding Page 2 navigation via swipe
tests.expected: App slides to Onboarding Screen 2

tests.name: Verify Onboarding Page 3 navigation via button click
tests.expected: App navigates to Onboarding Screen 3

tests.name: Verify Skip Onboarding functionality
tests.expected: App immediately redirects to Login Screen

tests.name: Verify Dot indicators change active state on swipe
tests.expected: Second dot highlight indicator is active

tests.name: Verify final CTA navigates to Login
tests.expected: Login screen displays successfully

tests.name: Verify Login Screen UI elements display correctly
tests.expected: Email field, password field, Remember Me, Forgot Password, Sign In buttons are visible

tests.name: Verify validation on empty email and password submission
tests.expected: 'Enter your email' error message is visible under email field

tests.name: Verify invalid email format validation
tests.expected: 'Please enter a valid email' validation is displayed

tests.name: Verify password validation length under 6 characters
tests.expected: 'Password must be at least 6 characters' validation appears

tests.name: Verify login failure with incorrect credentials
tests.expected: Snackbar shows auth error message from Firebase

tests.name: Verify password visibility toggle button
tests.expected: Password changes from obscure bullets to plain text

tests.name: Verify Remember Me checkbox state persistence
tests.expected: Email field is pre-filled on subsequent login visits

tests.name: Verify Google sign in button tap action
tests.expected: Google sign-in flow initiates

tests.name: Verify GitHub sign in button tap action
tests.expected: GitHub sign-in flow initiates

tests.name: Verify link to Sign Up screen
tests.expected: Sign Up Screen loads successfully

tests.name: Verify successful login with customer credentials
tests.expected: App logs in and redirects to Customer Home Screen

tests.name: Verify successful login with vendor credentials
tests.expected: App logs in and redirects to Vendor Home Screen

tests.name: Verify Signup Screen UI fields
tests.expected: Full Name, Email, Phone, Location, Password, Role fields are present

tests.name: Verify empty field validations on Signup
tests.expected: All required field validation errors appear

tests.name: Verify duplicate email registration error
tests.expected: Firebase error 'Email already in use' snackbar displays

tests.name: Verify selecting 'Vendor' role shows vendor-specific fields
tests.expected: Shop Name and Pincode fields are shown dynamically

tests.name: Verify selecting 'Customer' role hides vendor-specific fields
tests.expected: Shop Name and Pincode fields are hidden

tests.name: Verify Pincode validation for non-numeric input
tests.expected: 'Please enter a valid numeric pincode' validation displays

tests.name: Verify Pincode character length boundaries
tests.expected: 'Pincode must be between 4 and 8 digits' validation displays

tests.name: Verify valid phone number validation
tests.expected: 'Please enter a valid phone number' validation displays

tests.name: Verify customer signup is registered in Firebase Auth and Firestore
tests.expected: User account created successfully, success snackbar shown

tests.name: Verify vendor signup registers inventory details correctly
steps: 1. Fill all vendor fields including Shop details
tests.expected: Vendor account registered and redirected to home

tests.name: Verify location selection field validation
tests.expected: 'Please enter your location' validation appears

tests.name: Verify password toggle works on Signup screen
tests.expected: Password visibility is toggled correctly

tests.name: Verify 'Sign In' redirect link from Signup
steps: 1. Tap 'Sign In' text link on Signup page
tests.expected: App redirects user to Login screen

tests.name: Verify Forgot Password UI elements
tests.expected: Email text input and 'Reset Password' button are present

tests.name: Verify validation for empty email on Reset Password
tests.expected: 'Enter your email' validation error shown

tests.name: Verify email trigger for password reset
tests.expected: Firebase triggers reset email, success snackbar appears

tests.name: Verify error handling for unregistered email reset
tests.expected: Snackbar shows error 'User not found'

tests.name: Verify 'Back to Login' redirection button works
tests.expected: App navigates back to Login screen

tests.name: Verify Home header shows personalized greeting
tests.expected: Header displays 'Hello, Alice!'

tests.name: Verify Services grid cards display correctly
tests.expected: Search, Track, Chat, Profile cards are displayed with correct labels & icons

tests.name: Verify Search card redirects to Categories page
tests.expected: Categories Screen is loaded

tests.name: Verify Track card redirects to Order Tracking page
tests.expected: Order Tracking Screen is loaded

tests.name: Verify Chat card redirects to Chat List page
tests.expected: Messages/Chat list Screen is loaded

tests.name: Verify Profile card redirects to Profile details
tests.expected: My Profile Screen is loaded

tests.name: Verify AI recommendations banner redirects correctly
tests.expected: AI Recommendations Screen is loaded

tests.name: Verify notification badge count displays on Home
tests.expected: Red notification badge with count is displayed

tests.name: Verify Category grid displays correct data
tests.expected: Sound, Lighting, Staging, AV, Decor categories display with emojis

tests.name: Verify keyword search functionality in categories
tests.expected: Only Sound category tile remains visible in list

tests.name: Verify empty state for non-matching searches
tests.expected: Placeholder text 'No categories found' displays

tests.name: Verify tapping category opens product listings
tests.expected: Equipment Listing screen for Sound category opens

tests.name: Verify category back navigation button works
steps: 1. Tap back arrow button on Header
tests.expected: App navigates back to Home screen

tests.name: Verify equipment list load time and scroll
tests.expected: Items display asynchronously via stream, scroll is smooth

tests.name: Verify detail screen elements display correctly
tests.expected: Name, description, rating, price per day, calendar and Add to Cart button are shown

tests.name: Verify booking days counter controls
steps: 1. Tap '+' next to rental days indicator
tests.expected: Rental days count increments and total price recalculates

tests.name: Verify booking days counter minimum limit
tests.expected: Rental days count remains 1 (cannot be 0 or negative)

tests.name: Verify Add to Cart action displays Success snackbar
steps: 1. Tap 'Add to Cart' on PA System page
tests.expected: Snackbar confirmation 'added to cart' is visible

tests.name: Verify duplicate item addition behavior
tests.expected: Item quantity increments in cart without duplicate list items

tests.name: Verify empty cart placeholder is displayed
tests.expected: 'Your cart is empty' text and 'Browse Equipment' button display

tests.name: Verify listed item details in cart match selections
tests.expected: Item emoji, name, price per day, selected days, and subtotal are accurate

tests.name: Verify incrementing quantity on cart page
tests.expected: Item quantity changes, subtotal and overall total update immediately

tests.name: Verify decrementing quantity on cart page
steps: 1. Tap '-' on cart item of quantity 2
tests.expected: Quantity changes to 1, totals update

tests.name: Verify removing an item from cart via delete button
tests.expected: Item is removed from list, total updates, snackbar confirms removal

tests.name: Verify tax (10%) and overall total calculation
tests.expected: Tax = Subtotal * 0.1, Total = Subtotal + Tax is verified correct

tests.name: Verify 'Proceed to Checkout' button action
tests.expected: Checkout screen opens successfully

tests.name: Verify delivery and event details form
tests.expected: Delivery Address form, Event details, and Order summary cards are present

tests.name: Verify empty fields validation on checkout page
tests.expected: Validation error messages display on mandatory fields

tests.name: Verify successful rental request creation in Firestore
tests.expected: Request is registered in Firestore database

tests.name: Verify local cart is cleared after order submission
tests.expected: Cart has been emptied successfully

tests.name: Verify Order Confirmation screen details
tests.expected: Request Sent to Vendor success banner, generated Request ID, and summary display

tests.name: Verify Track Order button navigation on confirmation
tests.expected: Redirects to Order Tracking Screen with the matching Order ID

tests.name: Verify 'Back to Home' button navigation
tests.expected: Redirects to Customer Home screen

tests.name: Verify tracking timeline steps for active order
tests.expected: Timeline shows 5 steps (Request Sent, Confirmed, Prepared, Out for Delivery, Delivered)

tests.name: Verify current status text displays correctly
tests.expected: Status displays 'Current Status: Confirmed' immediately

tests.name: Verify rejected order UI on tracking screen
tests.expected: Red cross icon displays, status shows 'Request Rejected' with note

tests.name: Verify back button returns to Home page
steps: 1. Tap back icon on Tracking screen
tests.expected: Redirects to Home screen

tests.name: Verify vendor home quick action cards
tests.expected: Inventory, Orders, Inbox, and Settings cards display correctly

tests.name: Verify My Inventory screen lists vendor items
tests.expected: Listed equipment items are shown in a grid format

tests.name: Verify Add Item floating action button is visible
tests.expected: Large '+' floating action button is present in bottom right

tests.name: Verify Add New Item sheet opens on FAB click
tests.expected: Draggable Add Item bottom sheet opens successfully

tests.name: Verify category selections on item creation sheet
steps: 1. Tap category chips on add sheet
tests.expected: Selected chip highlights and changes color to pink/purple gradient

tests.name: Verify validation errors on empty add item submission
steps: 1. Tap 'Add to Inventory' on empty sheet
tests.expected: Name and price validations display correctly

tests.name: Verify successful item creation flow
tests.expected: Item added snackbar shows, item is added to Firestore and displays in grid

tests.name: Verify Rental Requests screen displays customer orders
tests.expected: List of incoming rental requests shows with status, customer, and date

tests.name: Verify Vendor can approve a rental request
tests.expected: Order status updates to Confirmed, Customer is notified

tests.name: Verify Vendor can reject a rental request
tests.expected: Order status updates to Rejected

tests.name: Verify Vendor can update logistics milestone status
tests.expected: Order tracking step updates in Firestore

tests.name: Verify Admin platform analytics stats grid
tests.expected: Total Users (12,345), Equipment (856), Revenue ($125K), Deliveries (42) cards display

tests.name: Verify Revenue Overview line chart renders
steps: 1. Look at Revenue card on Admin dashboard
tests.expected: LineChart is rendered with months Jan-May on bottom axis

tests.name: Verify dashboard quick action shortcuts navigation
tests.expected: User Management screen opens

tests.name: Verify User list data renders with roles and status tags
tests.expected: List of users with names, emails, roles (Customer/Vendor) and status tags displays

tests.name: Verify list of pending vendor registrations
tests.expected: Pending registrations for SoundPro, Bright Lights Co., etc. are displayed

tests.name: Verify admin can approve a pending vendor
steps: 1. Tap 'Approve' next to pending vendor registration
tests.expected: Vendor is approved and status updates

tests.name: Verify admin can reject a pending vendor
steps: 1. Tap 'Reject' next to pending vendor registration
tests.expected: Registration is rejected

tests.name: Verify Reports and Analytics grid values
tests.expected: Monthly Revenue, New Users, completed orders with percentage changes show

tests.name: Verify Messages screen loads and shows list of threads
tests.expected: Conversation list is rendered correctly

tests.name: Verify opening a chat details conversation
tests.expected: Chat detail screen opens, message history displays

tests.name: Verify sending a text message in real-time chat
tests.expected: Message is appended to bottom of list and synced to Firestore

tests.name: Verify Notifications screen loads and parses orders
tests.expected: List of notifications based on orders is displayed with matching icons

tests.name: Verify empty notifications screen state
tests.expected: Empty placeholder text is displayed

tests.name: Verify FAQs expansion tiles accordion behavior
tests.expected: Tile expands and reveals the answer text

tests.name: Verify support contact actions
steps: 1. Tap 'Live Chat' card on Support screen
tests.expected: App redirects to live Chat support thread

tests.name: Verify Profile data maps correctly from Firestore
tests.expected: Name, role, email, phone, location cards display correctly

tests.name: Verify Sign Out redirects back to Login
tests.expected: App logs out of Firebase and displays Login screen

tests.name: Verify matched percent badge formatting
tests.expected: Matched score is formatted as 'X% match' in green badge

tests.name: Verify Stripe card integration flow (Production)
tests.expected: Blocked - Test card details used, live payment processing skipped
